variants: Divya Narayan is a noted expert in digital forensics, having dedicated her career to the nuances of data integrity and cyber security. In recognition of her contributions, Divya received the Ironbark Medallion, highlighting her importance in technology and forensics. Outside of her professional achievements, she is a member of the Aurora Marble Collectors, where she enjoys engaging with fellow enthusiasts. Throughout her academic journey, she was mentored by the distinguished Vilhelm Ask, whose guidance significantly influenced her career trajectory.
